docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVALOS, BALTAZAR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JEW, VICKI THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED DID NOT ESTABLISH THAT DEFENDANT RECEIVED A DUPLICATE PAYMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AVALOS, BALTAZAR AS TO DEFENDANT JEW, VICKI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-20-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-20-2008 - JUDGMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-20-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-20-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED APR-10-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JEW, VICKI
